atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right middle finger pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports four days of right middle finger pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain following a motor vehicle accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports making an angry gesture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports flipping someone the bird.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the distal phalanx of his right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is interested in whether the tramadol will be compatible with digoxin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An x-ray demonstrates a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain for two days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up x-ray in two weeks.
